title: Public Storage 2025 Form 10-K / Annual Report
publisher: Public Storage / U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission
note: Primary source for facility footprint, segment discussion, 2025 net income, risks, and self-storage operating economics.

title: Public Storage Investor Relations
note: Company investor-relations profile describing Public Storage as a large owner, operator, and developer of self-storage facilities.

title: Public Storage Official Website
note: Consumer-facing source for the company’s storage-unit offering, facility search, and product positioning.

title: Public Storage Market Cap & Net Worth
note: Market-data source used for late-May 2026 market capitalization and share-price context.

title: Sharetribe Marketplace Software
note: Marketplace software reference used as an enabling primitive for local storage marketplace and cooperative coordination concepts.

title: Sharetribe Go GitHub Repository
note: Source-available marketplace codebase reference for evaluating openness and reuse potential in marketplace-based alternatives.

title: OpenStreetMap Geocoding Documentation
note: Open geospatial data and geocoding reference used as an enabling primitive for decentralized local storage discovery.
